title: Run your irrigation business end-to-end
description: Cover slide — Built for Irrigation Companies. Tailored for Valor Landscape.

title: The problem
description: Paper, texts, and spreadsheets across disconnected tools. Stats: 4+ tools, Days to invoice, Limited visibility.

title: The solution
description: One app that connects the entire irrigation operation. Stats: 1 platform, 1-click QB/Aspire sync, Offline.

title: Four workflows. One connected operation.
description: Step 01 Estimate → Step 02 Work Order → Step 03 Wet Check → Step 04 Billing Sheet.

title: Mobile built for the truck, not the desk
description: Photo capture, right workflow for every job, offline-first field app.

title: Billing managers stay in control
description: Office-controlled pricing, full revision history, supporting documentation attached.

title: Everything an irrigation company runs on
description: Six feature highlights: estimates, work orders, wet checks, billing sheets, site maps, roles.

title: QuickBooks/Aspire integration
description: Push approved billing directly into QuickBooks/Aspire. Mock UI with three sample jobs.

title: Who it's for
description: Owners & Admins, Irrigation Managers, Field Techs, Billing Managers.
